title: Sonny Boy
writer: Jimmy Starr, C. Graham Baker, Jack L. Warner
actors: Davey Lee, Edward Everett Horton, Betty Bronson
plot: On the eve of her divorce, a mother enlists her sister's aid in smuggling her young son out of the house, fearing that she will lose custody of him and hides out in the apartment of her husband's bachelor lawyer, who has just left...
